subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of the Merciful saith: O My friend and son of My Afnán! The robe of honor hath been cut and prepared for thy temple
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان رحمت میفرماید ای دوست من و فرزند افنان من جامه عزت باندازه هیاکل شما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
